semantic.role: Core TypeScript module defining shared data transfer object (DTO) interfaces for the ArchSpine synchronization and manifest system.
responsibilities: Defines the SyncBlock interface representing the state of a synchronization operation.
Defines the DocRef interface representing a reference to a localized documentation file.
Defines the FileStatus interface representing the status of a file within the system.
Defines the SpineManifest interface representing the root manifest structure for the ArchSpine project.
outOfScope: Validation or transformation of DTO data.
invariants: All exported symbols are TypeScript interfaces.
Interfaces define data structures without methods.
Relies on imported types from './index-documents.js' and './versions.js'.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, type-safe contract for core data shapes used across the ArchSpine synchronization and manifest subsystems.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file from the provided git intent; the refactor likely affected other components.

ruleViolations.reason: Exported interfaces (SyncBlock, DocRef, FileStatus, SpineManifest) do not start with the character 'I' as required by the interface-prefix rule for internal interfaces.
